name: Stuffed Chiles with Olive Mole
recipeIngredient: 4 To 6 Anaheim or poblano chiles or bell peppers
recipeInstructions:
Chiles
1. Salt the chiles to taste.
2. Chop half of the olives and slice the other half, reserving for the mole sauce.
3. Mix chopped olives, Ricotta cheese, and Shredded Jack cheese in a bowl.
4. Slice down one side of each chile, remove seeds, and spoon in the filling mixture.
5. Place 1/8 inch hot water in a baking pan. Arrange the chiles cut-side up; cover with foil.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
Mole
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion in oil for 2 minutes.
2. Add remaining mole ingredients (corn meal, tomato paste, chili powder, garlic powder, and cumin), plus the reserved sliced olives, to the skillet.
3. Simmer for five minutes.
Makes 4 servings
